column1: -- Step 1: Identify all unique accounts that are contracts by finding receivers of DEPLOY_CONTRACT actions.
-- Step 2: Get all unique accounts active on or before 2024-03-20.
-- An account is active if it signed or received any transaction action.
-- Step 3: Filter out contract accounts to get "user-only" accounts.
-- Step 4: Categorize user accounts into shards and count them.
